_publications._context: We maintained MPNST cell lines ST88-14, STS26T, S520, S462, 88-3, 90-8 and YST1 as described previously | ST8814, ST88-3 and 90-8 were generously provided by Dr. Nancy Ratner (Cincinnati Children's Hospital, OH) | Human MPNST cell lines S462, STS-26T, ST88-14, and 90-8 and an immortalized normal human Schwann cell line (iHSCλ2) were obtained from Nancy Ratner | MPNST cell lines STS26T, ST8814, ST88-3 S462, T265p21, S520, 90–8, and YST1
